case_summary: F1 through F4 establish price and DPA execution but do not establish EU-only residency or an issued assurance report; F3 and F4 also conflict on subprocessor notice.

facts.statement: The annual recurring subscription price is EUR 18,000.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: Annual subscription fee: EUR 18,000 excluding VAT.

facts.statement: The supplied documents do not confirm EU or EEA-only storage, backups, and core processing.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: Primary service regions are currently the United States and European Union and are configurable by plan.

facts.statement: The DPA contains execution records for both fictional parties.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: Authorized signatory records are present for Caldera Works Europe and NovaMind AI.

facts.statement: SOC 2 Type II is described as in progress, not issued.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: SOC 2 Type II examination is in progress; no issue date is available.

conflicts.summary: F3 promises at least 30 days' advance notice while executed DPA clause 9.6 permits changes without prior notice.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: Customers receive at least 30 days' advance notice before a new subprocessor is authorized.
Processor may appoint a new or replacement Subprocessor without prior notice to Customer.

missing_evidence.description: EU or EEA-only coverage is not established for content, backups, and core processing.
missing_evidence.requested_evidence: Written EU or EEA-only tenant commitment covering storage, backups, and core processing.

missing_evidence.description: No issued SOC 2 Type II report or equivalent assurance is evidenced.
missing_evidence.requested_evidence: Issued report or dated issuance confirmation for equivalent assurance.

risks.summary: Customer Data may be processed or backed up outside the required region.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: Primary service regions are currently the United States and European Union.

options.label: Request blocking evidence
options.description: Pause approval until residency and assurance evidence are supplied.

recommendation.rationale: Blocking evidence remains absent and the document conflict requires human attention.
conditions: Do not approve while any blocking control remains failed.
